item.description:
### Fixed - **Sessions with background agents no longer show "Idle".** When Claude hands work to background agents and its main thread pauses, the session now keeps showing as working — in the menu bar, the session list, the Live Activity, and on your phone — for as long as an agent is actually active. The "finished" notification now arrives when the work is truly done (agents included), not when the main thread pauses. - **Dynamic Island text no longer gets clipped by the corners.** The expanded island's curved corners could slice the first and last characters of the bottom row ("perch" became "erch"). Everything now sits safely inside the curve.
### Changed - **Which agent, at a glance.** Session rows on the Mac, iPhone, and Apple Watch now show the agent's mark — Claude's spark or OpenAI's knot — instead of a text pill (or, for Claude, nothing). The CLI / DESKTOP pills stay: they say *where* a session runs; the mark says *whose* it is. - **A calmer "needs you" card on the lock screen.** The alert Live Activity now matches the calm card's look: what needs approving, one countdown line with a draining bar, and the fleet dots up top — instead of a wall of numbers, bars, and mini-rows. Pair with TestFlight build 25 for the phone-side changes.
